events.name: Eurozone Industrial Production (M-o-M)
events.description: Measures the monthly change in output from factories, mines and utilities across the euro area, a gauge of manufacturing health.

events.name: US Monthly Budget Statement (Jun)
events.description: Reports the US federal government's monthly budget surplus or deficit, reflecting spending and revenue trends.

events.name: US CPI (Y-o-Y)
events.description: Tracks the annual change in prices paid by US consumers, a primary gauge for Federal Reserve interest rate policy.

events.name: China M2 Money Supply (Y-o-Y)
events.description: Measures the annual growth rate of China's money supply, an indicator of monetary conditions and credit expansion.

events.name: China GDP (Q2, Y-o-Y)
events.description: Measures the annual pace of economic growth in China's second quarter, a key barometer of global demand.

events.name: Canada BoC Interest Rate Decision
events.description: The Bank of Canada's benchmark rate announcement, signaling its outlook on inflation, growth and borrowing costs.

events.name: UK GDP (M-o-M)
events.description: Tracks the monthly change in UK economic output, providing an early read on growth momentum.

events.name: US Initial Jobless Claims
events.description: Weekly count of new US unemployment benefit applications, an early signal of labour market conditions.

events.name: Eurozone HICP Final (Y-o-Y)
events.description: The confirmed final reading of euro area consumer price inflation, guiding the European Central Bank's policy outlook.

events.name: US Michigan Consumer Sentiment (Preliminary)
events.description: Gauges US consumer confidence and inflation expectations, a leading indicator of future household spending.
